Layout.name: ModifierTemplate List

StyledText.Data: You can choose any name for your modifier. However, the name will be “prettified” using _underscore_in the JSON key.

Choose attribute type depending on how you want to the JSON key value to be formatted. Prettified string Will replace capital letters with lower-case, åäö with aao and spaces with dash “-”. Number An integer value. If empty it will be replaced with 0 (zero). URL encoded string A string where all characters except A-Z, a-z are replaced with %. Media Will enable a media container as an modifier input. The value will be the prettified file name of the media file in the container. The media itself will be included in the media export. String Unaltered key value. Depending on characters, this might create a corrupt JSON. Text Will enable a text field that can be localised as an input field.. Link A reference to a Link in FAT with a popup menu with Links in Title to choose from. Color A reference to a Color in FAT. Enables a popup menu choose from for input. Page item A reference to a Page item in FAT. Enables a popup menu choose from for input. Text style A reference to a Text style in FAT. Enables a popup menu choose from for input.

CharacterStyle.Text: Will enable a text field that can be localised as an input field..
A reference to a Link in FAT with a popup menu with Links in Title to choose from.
A reference to a Color in FAT. Enables a popup menu choose from for input.
A reference to a Page item in FAT. Enables a popup menu choose from for input.
A reference to a Text style in FAT. Enables a popup menu choose from for input.

ParagraphStyle.Text: Text Will enable a text field that can be localised as an input field.. Link A reference to a Link in FAT with a popup menu with Links in Title to choose from. Color A reference to a Color in FAT. Enables a popup menu choose from for input.
A reference to a Page item in FAT. Enables a popup menu choose from for input.
A reference to a Text style in FAT. Enables a popup menu choose from for input.

StyledText.Data: The attribute description will be visible for authors and editors when adding content and entering key values to the FAT.
The default value is the initial value for this attribute. Leave blank for no default value. Example “#345678”
What kind of package type or application will use this modfier? Slide, Scroll, Insight or a combination? This information is used when setting up a new Title.
Enter a comma-separated list for values that can bu used as a radio button list or a checkbox list. (Previously called stateToggle states).
The modifier description will be visible for authors and editors when adding content and entering key values to the FAT.
Choose which is the lowest privilege set that will be able to edit this modifier value. Developer = 4 Author = 3 Editor = 2 Translator = 1

LayoutObject.name: Page item level 2
Page level 1
Chapter level 1
Package level 1
Title level 1
